texto: It's one of the greatest gifts you can give someone, knowing their stories.
explicacao: Citação de Emily Skrutskie sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “It's one of the greatest gifts you can give someone, knowing their stories.” articula reflexao, stories, greatest em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: But before that day it felt like at least I had an ally on this boat. Now I have nothing. Well, I have a fat baby sea monster. But Bao doesn't tell jokes, and somehow I need that.I hate how I need that.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Emily Skrutskie: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “But before that day it felt like at least I had an ally on this boat. Now I have nothing. Well, I…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, loneliness, sea-monsters pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de sea-monsters.

texto: And it sucks, because I want to kiss her. It's infuriating how perfect it would be to kiss her right now, perched on a cannon on a pirate ship under the stars. That sounds like something off the pages of an adventure novel. But my life isn't one of those stories. My story is a hurricane, and here with Swift is just the eye.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Emily Skrutskie: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “And it sucks, because I want to kiss her. It's infuriating how perfect it would be to kiss her ri…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, glbt, kiss pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de kiss e love.

frase_original: And it sucks, because I want to kiss her. It's infuriating how perfect it would be to kiss her right now, perched on a cannon on a pirate ship under the stars. That sounds like something off the pages of an adventure novel. But my life isn't one of those stories. My story is a hurricane, and here with Swift is just the eye.
